title: Tisserand Aromatherapy - Organic Citronella Essential Oil - 9 ml
features: MADE IN THE UK: Tisserand Aromatherapy has been sourcing 100% natural pure essential oils since 1974. Handed down over the years, our knowledge and expertise of essential oils ensures we are one of the most trusted brands in aromatherapy and wellbeing

STIMULATING: Citronella has been historically known for being an effective insect repellent. It can help counteract indecision and lethargy. It may assist in providing support to the immune system. Citronella Organic essential oil may offer help to soothe abdominal discomfort and sluggish digestion when used in a massage blend

FRESH AROMA: Indulge in the sharp and zesty aroma of our essential oil. This citrus 100% natural pure essential oil is a base note essential oil and features a refreshing scent that pairs well with Orange, Frankincense and Lime essential oils

ORGANIC: Our Organic Citronella essential oil derives from 100% pure Cymbopogon winterianus (Citronella) Oil which has been steam distilled from the long leaves of the aromatic tropical grass and grown without man-made fertilisers or pesticides. Using ecosystem management methods to maintain the health of both plants and soil to guarantee that there is no genetic modification or irradiation

HOW TO USE: Diffusing: 6-8 drops in a diffuser or burner. Creates a stimulating and uplifting atmosphere. Massage blend: up to 5 drops per 10ml of blending oil. Helpful for relieving muscular aches and pains and soothing digestive discomfort. In the bath: 4-6 drops per 20ml of blending oil. Add to bath water and swirl to disperse. Not recommended for those with sensitive skin
description: Product Description Experience the benefits of natural comfort and relaxation with our range of 100% natural pure essential oils. With 50 years of experience and award-winning products, we meticulously select and source essential oils to create skin care remedies, and bath and body products that promote overall wellbeing. Our Citronella Organic essential oil can help soothe abdominal discomfort and it is known for its zesty aroma. In addition to this, we offer a variety of essential oils such as Bergamot, Peppermint, and Tea Tree, as well as dermatologically tested deodorants and soothing body oils. Our bestselling products make for thoughtful gifts and are perfect for those looking to explore the world of aromatherapy. All of our ingredients are responsibly and ethically sourced from suppliers who share our values. We have remained true to ourselves since 1974 and continue to expertly make and blend all our aromatherapy oils in the UK. We strive to make aromatherapy accessible to all, ensuring everyone can enjoy the wellbeing benefits of Tisserand Aromatherapy. Ingredients 100% Pure Cymbopogon winterianus (citronella) oil Directions Diffusing: 6-8 drops in a diffuser or burner, Massage blend: up to 5 drops per 10ml of blending oil, Add to bath water and swirl to disperse Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid using Citronella essential oil in massage on people with sensitive or allergy prone skin. Do not use undiluted on the skin. Avoid contact with sensitive areas, such as eyes. Do not use essential oils on children under 5 years old. Consult your healthcare professional before using essential oils during pregnancy. Best kept in a cool dry place. Naturally occurring allergens: Citral, Citronellol, Eugenol, Farnesol, Geraniol, Limone, Linalool. May produce an allergic reaction. See more
